name: Inventory Planning Export
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can export comprehensive inventory data for external analysis and planning by accessing the Inventory Planning Export, which provides detailed stock level, sales velocity, and reorder information in spreadsheet format. This export capability helps retail operators perform advanced inventory analysis, share planning data with suppliers, and integrate inventory information with external business intelligence or forecasting tools."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the Inventory Planning Export helps retail operators conduct sophisticated inventory analysis outside the system, collaborate with suppliers on stock planning, and support strategic inventory management initiatives with comprehensive data."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find "}, {"text": "related articles ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Inventory Planning Export provides detailed product information, along with: current SOH, monthly Purchase Order quantities and monthly sales quantities."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Considerations when using this report:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This report will be exported to Excel, "}, {"text": "not", "italic": true}, {"text": " displayed on-screen."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the Inventory Planning Export navigate to:"}, {"text": " Reports > Stock Reports > Inventory Planning Export", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppQZ3EAM.jpg", "embedData": {"url": filtering fields are self explanatory, however see the detailed information below for the more advanced fields."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Master Pricing Outlet ", "bold": true}, {"text": "- Pricing for the selected Outlet will be used in the product pricing fields, such as Supplier Buy and COGS."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Group Inventory Outlet", "bold": true}, {"text": " - Aggregated inventory, purchase order, and sales information will be shown for all Outlets selected"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Apply filtering as required > click Export to Excel > Open or Save the report."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This is a Legacy Report, commissioned in the early days of Retail
